PowerShell(cd C:\\Progetti\\the-fold; $utf8NoBom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false; $files = @\("scripts\\main\\Main.gd","scripts\\entities\\EntityGenerator.gd","scripts\\prestige\\PrestigeSystem.gd","scripts\\core\\SaveManager.gd"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $raw = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($f\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($raw\); $hex = \($raw | Select-Object -First 200 | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\("X2"\) }\) -join " "; Write-Host "$f first bytes: $hex" })
